svg.title: TaskFlow full system architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: Browser (React SPA), Node.js/Express API with sub-components, and MySQL database, connected by REST+WebSocket and TCP.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the auth pages in the frontend')
sendPrompt('What pages exist in the frontend?')
sendPrompt('How does state management work in the frontend?')
sendPrompt('How does realtime work in the frontend?')
sendPrompt('What UI libraries are used in the frontend?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the middleware stack in the backend')
sendPrompt('What API routes exist in the backend?')
sendPrompt('What do the service layer classes handle?')
sendPrompt('How does the Socket.IO server work in the backend?')
sendPrompt('How does the deadline scheduler work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Nodemailer email service work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Swagger docs and rate limiting')
sendPrompt('How are file uploads handled?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the User model schema')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Project model schema')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Task model schema')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the TaskAssignment model')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the WorkLog model')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the LogReply model')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Notification model')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the AuditLog model')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the RefreshToken model')

svg.text: All 3 services orchestrated via docker-compose · CI/CD via GitHub Actions on push to main
